mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling or already near the lower bound, discount rates and recession fears ease together, supporting equity multiples and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: If monthly FEDFUNDS declines are followed by negative 20d SPX returns in a majority of cases, or rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03, reject the signal.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in FEDFUNDS above a restrictive threshold tightens financial conditions and raises the equity discount rate, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If triggered observations with FEDFUNDS above 4.5% still deliver positive 20d SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or the sign of the effect is not negative in out-of-sample tests, reject it.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in PAYEMS and rise in UNRATE indicate labor-market deterioration, which weakens earnings expectations and leads to negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if joint labor deterioration does not predict negative 20d SPX returns, or if the combined signal has no incremental value over either PAYEMS or UNRATE alone.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in RSAFS above trend reflects stronger consumer demand and revenue growth, which should support positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: If RSAFS growth above 0.5% fails to coincide with positive 20d SPX returns in a majority of triggered instances, or the signal is indistinguishable from noise, reject.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO together with a falling UNRATE signals broad real-activity improvement and stable operating leverage, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint INDPRO-up and UNRATE-down pattern does not predict positive 60d SPX returns, or if the effect disappears after controlling for either series individually.

mechanism_narrative: Low housing starts signal weaker cyclical demand and softer growth expectations, which should pressure equity prices and generate negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST below its 12-month average is not associated with negative 60d SPX returns, or if predictive performance is not better than random across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in UNRATE after a period of labor-market stability marks an impending earnings downgrade cycle, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: If unemployment jumps of more than 0.3pp in three months do not precede negative 5d SPX returns more often than not, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 is expanding while RSAFS is also accelerating, the economy is generating synchronized real and nominal demand strength that supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous GDPC1 and RSAFS acceleration does not improve 60d SPX return prediction beyond either series alone, or if the joint signal is negative in out-of-sample tests.
